name: skycastle-claude
description: Wires the skycastle secrets-manager MCP daemon into Claude Code: one HTTP MCP server on port 8210 exposing secret CRUD (get/set/list/delete, versions, tags), KMS, certificates, SSH, secret-scanning, PAM, AI, and token tools. Bundles a daemon watchdog monitor that alerts on up/down state change, a PreToolUse hook that redirects `skycastle secrets`/`export` CLI subcommands to the richer MCP tools, a /skycastle-status command, and an operate skill. Additive — complements native tools, does not replace them.
